hero.body: Locally and independently owned veterinary care in Fort Thomas and Independence, Kentucky — with Fear-Free handling, clear communication, and practical plans for every life stage.
hero.imageAlt: Dog and cat receiving compassionate veterinary care

seo.title: About Veterinary Medical Center | Northern Kentucky Vet
seo.description: Meet Veterinary Medical Center, an independently owned veterinary hospital serving Fort Thomas and Independence with compassionate dog and cat care.

acf.intro: Veterinary Medical Center is a women-led, locally owned veterinary practice serving Northern Kentucky families from Fort Thomas and Independence.
sections: We believe excellent veterinary care should feel personal, understandable, and grounded in long-term relationships.
Our team focuses on Fear-Free handling, honest communication, and thoughtful medicine for dogs and cats.

seo.title: Veterinary Services in Northern Kentucky | VMC
seo.description: Explore wellness exams, vaccines, dental care, surgery, urgent care, and Fear Free dog and cat care at VMC.

acf.intro: From routine wellness visits to dental care, surgery, and urgent appointments, our NKY vet team handles a full range of care at both locations.

seo.title: New Patients | Veterinary Medical Center
seo.description: New patients are welcome at Veterinary Medical Center in Fort Thomas and Independence, KY.

acf.intro: Looking for a new veterinarian in Northern Kentucky? We welcome new patients at both Fort Thomas and Independence.
steps: Call or request an appointment at either location
Bring any prior vet records or vaccination history
Arrive a few minutes early to complete paperwork
Share concerns, behavior changes, or symptoms
Ask about wellness plans and ongoing care options

seo.title: Contact Veterinary Medical Center | Fort Thomas & Independence
seo.description: Contact VMC in Fort Thomas or Independence, KY for appointments, questions, directions, and veterinary care.

acf.intro: Call either location or request an appointment online. Our team will help you choose the right next step.

seo.title: Patient Portal & Online Booking | VMC
seo.description: Access VMC patient portal resources and online booking information.

acf.intro: Existing clients can use the patient portal for online booking and account resources.

seo.title: Online Vet Pharmacy | VMC
seo.description: Order trusted veterinary medications and preventives through VMC pharmacy resources.

title: Vet Near Me in Northern Kentucky

seo.title: Vet Near Me in Northern Kentucky | VMC
seo.description: Searching for a vet near me in Northern Kentucky? Visit locally owned VMC in Fort Thomas or Independence.
